outlets.name: CNN
outlets.headline: Fragile ceasefire in the balance as Iran says halting Hormuz traffic over Lebanon strikes
outlets.summary: CNN focuses on ceasefire collapse risk — Iran re-closes Hormuz after Israel's Lebanon massacre. 254 killed in Operation Eternal Darkness.

outlets.name: Washington Post
outlets.headline: Iran closes Strait of Hormuz in response to Israeli attacks on Lebanon
outlets.summary: WaPo reports Hormuz re-closure as ceasefire unravels. Lebanon excluded from deal triggers Iranian response.

outlets.name: Fox News
outlets.headline: Vance warns Iran will 'find out Trump not one to mess around' if ceasefire fails
outlets.summary: Fox leads with Vance's warning from Budapest. Frames ceasefire as Trump leverage over Iran.

outlets.name: NY Post
outlets.headline: Hegseth declares 'overwhelming victory' in Iran as ceasefire takes hold
outlets.summary: Coverage of Hegseth's Pentagon briefing declaring Operation Epic Fury a 'historic victory.'

outlets.name: Al Jazeera
outlets.headline: At least 254 killed in Israel's devastating attacks across Lebanon today
outlets.summary: Al Jazeera leads with Lebanon massacre — Operation Eternal Darkness. 254 killed, 1,165 wounded. Central Beirut hit during rush hour.

outlets.name: BBC
outlets.headline: Iran war ceasefire fractures as Israel excludes Lebanon and Iran re-closes Hormuz
outlets.summary: BBC analysis: ceasefire already fracturing. Lebanon excluded, Hormuz re-closed, both sides claim victory.

outlets.name: Times of Israel
outlets.headline: Netanyahu backs Iran truce; opposition blames him for worst-ever 'diplomatic disaster'
outlets.summary: ToI covers domestic political fallout. Lapid: 'greatest political disaster.' Netanyahu: 'not the end of the war.'

outlets.name: Haaretz
outlets.headline: Netanyahu: Iran cease-fire 'not end of war,' all goals will be achieved
outlets.summary: Haaretz reports Netanyahu insists Lebanon excluded, war goals remain. 3 children injured in Negev from Iranian missiles despite ceasefire.

outlets.name: Press TV
outlets.headline: Pezeshkian: Iran will continue to stand together after ceasefire — result of martyred leader's blood
outlets.summary: Press TV frames ceasefire as Iranian victory. SNSC: Iran 'forced criminal America to accept its 10-point plan.'

outlets.name: Tehran Times
outlets.headline: Iran suspends Hormuz transit over Israeli aggression against Lebanon
outlets.summary: Tehran Times reports Hormuz re-closure as response to Israel's Lebanon strikes. IRGC: 'Aggression towards Lebanon is aggression towards Iran.'
